text.tspan: ​ How to Read the Wind Rose​
​ Direction: Each spoke points in the direction the wind is coming FROM. North (top) means wind blowing southward. The plot is oriented clockwise.​
​ Length: The longer the spoke, the more frequently wind came from that direction.​
​ Color: Each color band represents a wind speed range (m/s). Lighter blue = calm winds, dark navy = strong winds, orange/red = highest speeds.​
